findings: No globe-derived constant or formula identified. WIN-034 is a purely theological/linguistic claim based on Hebrew etymology (Job 37:18 re'i muzaq, Deut 28:23 nechoshet). It contains no numerical values, no formulas, no parameters that could hide a globe quantity. The secondary reasoning chain (copper → conductive → EM cavity → Schumann) does connect to globe-derived physics (Schumann f ≈ c/(2πR_Earth)), but that fingerprint belongs to WIN-029, not WIN-034. WIN-034 itself is a material assertion from biblical exegesis with zero computational content.
